name: SCP 076-2 "Able"
description:
SCP 076-2 is classified as a Keter Class anomaly,

A coordinated site wide raid by the Chaos Insurgency at Site-19 has caused the breaching of multiple anomalies, which was swiftly contained by Epsilon-11 sent over to contain anomalies and Nu-7 to do a site wide sweep to terminate any Chaos Insurgents. SCP 076-2 was the only SCP missing.

SCP-076-2 last location was right in the mountains of Alaska 35 kilometres away from Site-19 in the last 2 weeks ever since Site-19's raid.

What is your role in this story?

Would you want to be a random civilian who has gone hiking and encountered 076-2 out of pure bad luck?

Or

Would you want to be a foundation agent/squad, that is on a manhunt for SCP-076-2 to contain it and to prevent any further casualties?

Or!

Do whatever you want I don't care 😛

Art by: SunnyClockWork on Deviant Art
creator: Boopis
